steps.t: The Greylin runs south out of Ered Mithrin to the east of Khadâsh-gâra. Gaustaf has asked you to pan the Greylin in several locations and bring him wh…
Gaustaf can be found at Khadâsh-gâra in Elderslade. You have found a few small gem-stones and interesting pebbles from panning the Greylin. You should…
